fields.title: Migrate sandbox/ feature
fields.description:
Move sandbox extension to tau/src/sandbox/

## Source files
- extensions/sandbox/src/index.ts
- extensions/sandbox/src/config.ts
- extensions/sandbox/src/fs-policy.ts
- extensions/sandbox/src/sandbox-bash.ts
- extensions/sandbox/src/workspace-root.ts

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/index.ts (initSandbox + exports for task)
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/config.ts
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/fs-policy.ts
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/bash.ts
- extensions/tau/src/sandbox/workspace-root.ts

## Changes
- Export initSandbox(pi, state) function
- Export createSandboxedBashOperations for task to use
- Store effective config in shared state
- Migrate config to tau namespace in settings.json
- Keep tool names: bash, edit, write
- Keep commands: /sandbox, /approval

## DoD
- Sandboxed bash/edit/write work
- /sandbox and /approval commands work
- Config loads from tau namespace
- state.sandbox.* accessible by other features
fields.close_reason: Copied sandbox into tau/src/sandbox (initSandbox), added exported createSandboxedBashOperations, and switched config to settings.tau.sandbox (with legacy fallback)
